title: SARA — GAS MASK SNIFF: 'EWW SOCKS!'
prompt: Tight close-up in @dentist-chair on @Sara reclined on the turquoise chair, paper bib clipped on, eyes uncertain but curious. From off-screen at the edge of the frame, a single soft cartoon-mitten-style gloved hand offers her the @gas-mask — the small pink-elephant pediatric nose-piece on a teal tube. Sara takes the mask in both her own hands, lifts it close, and takes one careful sniff. Her face transforms in slow-motion HORROR — nose wrinkling, lips curling, eyes squeezing shut. Sara (sniffing once, then recoiling): "Eww — eww — EWWWW!" Sara (loud and outraged, mask at arm's length): "It SMELLS like SOCKS! OLD SOCKS!" Solo shot — only Sara visible, only one off-screen gloved hand at frame edge, no full dentist body or face shown.
